sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 17

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 17:1
items.html: (to the question) As long as all the sparks and Kelim [vessels] that fell into BYA [Beria, Yetzira, Assiya] have not finished being clarified, the upper Partzufim also suffer from this, for every lower one is the discernment of the filling of its upper one; hence the lack at the bottom of all the lower ones touches the uppermost of the upper ones, as above in the adjacent passage, in Answer 121. And it is known that the completion of the correction is when "the feet reach the feet" — that is, when the feet of Atzilut end evenly with the feet of AK [Adam Kadmon] at the point of this world, when the three separated worlds BYA also return to being actual Atzilut. Therefore, until then, all the work lies upon the lower ones: to clarify, out of the Kelim and sparks, what belongs to the portions of their soul, and to raise them to the Nukva of Atzilut — and she to those above her — and to cause a Zivug [coupling] in the upper Mochin; and the MAN [Mayin Nukvin] are corrected in their MAD [Mayin Duchrin], whereby its Kelim and sparks rise and join from BYA to the building of the upper Partzufim and to the NRN [Nefesh, Ruach, Neshama] of the righteous. This applies every day and always, until all the Kelim and sparks have risen from BYA to the very last; then BYA will return to being Atzilut, and it will be the end of correction. (p. 734, Item 5)
